message:
feat(host): add lifecycle transition and journal query RPC handlers

Add three new async RPC endpoints for lifecycle management:
- lifecycle_transition_handler: process connector state transitions
  (enable/disable/restart/reload/uninstall/promote) with dry-run
- lifecycle_record_handler: query individual lifecycle records
- journal_query_handler: query admin state journal with filtering

Infrastructure additions:
- Helper functions for env var parsing (bool, u8, usize, bind targets)
- Unix socket and TCP bind target preparation utilities
- Supply chain policy: replace trusted_builders with allow_unsigned
  and require_digest_match configuration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
